arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta 'puts three loanees up for sale' as Fabio Vieira decision made
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly put all of Nuno Tavares, Fabio Vieira and Marquinhos - all of whom are currently on loan elsewhere - on their 2025 transfer list.

arts.ttl: Preview: Famalicao vs. Porto - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Primeira Liga clash between Famalicao and Porto, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils send scouts to 'gather information' on Porto duo
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly send scouts to watch two Porto stars in Monday's 2-0 win over Ruben Amorim's former side Casa Pia.
